title: ECHS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Specialist Posts
description: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Medical Specialist Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS, DNB, and post-graduation can apply for the ECHS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, select...
